Dialog.name: SYS_MIGRATE_SAVE_SUCCESS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Imported demo save data. You can access it by selecting Load Game on the title screen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_MIGRATE_SAVE_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Failed to load save data. [n]Returning to title screen.[n]{f 1 1}
